name: Chocolate Chip Peanut Butter Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a medium bowl, stir together the sugar, melted butter, peanut butter, eggs, and vanilla until well combined.
3. Add flour and mix until smooth.
4. Fold in the chocolate chips.
5. Pour batter into a greased 9-inch square baking pan.
6. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes or until lightly browned.
7. Allow to cool completely.
